prompt:
Subject:
A dreamy atelier sketched in sunlight

Person/Expression:
20s woman. Black hair tied in a loose messy bun, with sheer bangs and loose strands around the face. Natural makeup with a transparent feel, slightly parted lips, and a quiet, dreamy expression looking up at the light coming through the window.

Clothing/Pose:
Pale cream camisole dress with a small floral pattern and a thin ribbon at the chest. Loosely wearing a white sheer lace gown on the arms. Sitting at a wooden desk, one hand holding a thin brush to the mouth, and the other hand resting naturally on sketch paper. A watercolor palette, brushes, paint tubes, flower sketches, and brushes in glass jars are arranged on the desk.

Background/Lighting:
A large window with lace curtains on the left, with soft natural light from morning to early afternoon shining into the room. Pale posters and art references on the walls. On the right is a silhouette-shaped collage board of a female profile, with multiple photos of the seaside, flowers, bicycles, indoor scenes, and portraits layered together. Small photos include little girls holding letters, in-car selfie portraits, a woman smiling on a sofa, and a woman in a white dress, all blended with a warm beige filter. Surrounded by pale pink flowers, white flowers, twigs, and plants.

Composition/Camera:
3:2 landscape composition. Window and desk on the left, woman in the center-left, and a large silhouette collage on the right. Upper body to waist-up portrait, a natural indoor photo with a slightly wide-angle feel. Focus on the woman's face and hands, while background posters and collages are softly depicted enough to see details. 35mm lens, natural depth of field, and natural depth.

Texture/Style:
High-definition 4K, photo-style AI image, Japanese-style portrait, with a texture like a pale film photograph. Soft color correction based on cream, beige, and pale pink. Natural expression of lace, paper, wood grain, watercolor paint, and skin texture. Realistic skin that is not over-processed, with natural-looking pores and fine hair flow. A quiet and lingering atmosphere like a dreamy atelier.

Negative:
Low quality, unnatural face, unnatural hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, distorted fingers, strange eye contact, asymmetrical eyes, collapsed face, distorted body, extra arms, broken clothes, excessive processing, excessive skin correction, overexposure, unnatural textures unique to AI, unnatural background, collapsed faces in collage photos, garbled characters, logos, watermarks.
